name: Samy Skirted Slipcover Dining Chair Twill White - Threshold™: Elegant Upholstered Seat, Rubberwood Frame, 250lb Capacity
description:
Update your dining room with this Samy Skirted Slipcover Dining Chair from Threshold™. This armless dining chair features a slipcover design with an elegant skirted bottom to hide the legs. Complete with a padded seat and a high angled backrest, it keeps you sitting comfortably for a long time. The white twill upholstery pairs easily with a range of decor styles, while the wood frame offers solid structure and base.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.

Overall Width: 19 Inches
Overall Height: 37 Inches
Overall Depth: 25 Inches
